name: product-blueprint
description: Guided product/design workflow from research and PRD to branded Depth screens, reusable React components, fixture-data flows, explicit visual approval, and handoff before technical architecture.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and visually approve a branded product through reusable React components and complete user flows before technical design.
interface.longDescription: Product Blueprint guides reference research, direction and brand lock, PRD, Depth-based screen contracts, feasibility, Figma-informed component/variant/mode design, dependency-light React component and state boards, complete fixture-data flows, browser evidence, critique, explicit design acceptance, and handoff. Existing products extend their real components; greenfield output stays portable. Technical architecture and API/DB wiring remain a later opt-in phase.
defaultPrompt: Guide me from idea to an explicitly approved, branded product experience: confirm the mental model, map Depth and flows, create reusable React components and state boards, render every P0 fixture-data journey, absorb feasibility constraints, and stop before technical architecture and API/DB wiring.
